top_signals.title: Powell, Acceptance Remarks
top_signals.summary: Speech For the 2026 John F. Kennedy Profile in Courage Award, John F. Kennedy Library Foundation, Boston, Massachusetts
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Military Metals sinks on revoked Slovak antimony project licence
top_signals.summary: Trojarova, located near the capital city Bratislava, represents an advanced exploration stage project with considerable mining history.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Meta has struggled at selling anything other than ads. Will AI be different?
top_signals.summary: Meta is making a major push to expand its business beyond online advertising, but past efforts show that success is far from guaranteed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Deep Sea Minerals to list on Nasdaq
top_signals.summary: The company currently has no active projects but aims to secure a portfolio of seabed mining concessions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Pulsar Helium acquires 1,360 acres for $2.4M at Topaz project in Minnesota
top_signals.summary: Topaz is one of the leading primary helium discoveries in the US, the company said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Glencore, Gentile back historical Irish region project sporting 3.3% zinc, 10% lead
top_signals.summary: Fueled by the C$12 million raised in March, Group Eleven has more than tripled the size of its planned drilling program for PG West.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
